Help us maintain safe, clean streets. Re: Help us maintain safe, clean streets. Report potholes, broken lights, damaged infrastructure, and more. Your reports empower city officials to act fast.

Potholes, cracks, uneven pavement, and o: Potholes, cracks, uneven pavement, and other surface damage that poses safety risks.
Broken, malfunctioning, or missing stree: Broken, malfunctioning, or missing street lights affecting pedestrian and driver safety.

This is a secure area of the application: This is a secure area of the application. Please confirm your password before continuing.
Forgot your password? No problem. Just l: Forgot your password? No problem. Just let us know your email address and we will email you a password reset link that will allow you to choose a new one.
Name: Name

Madinova is a civic reporting platform t: Madinova is a civic reporting platform that helps residents notify local authorities about damaged roads, broken streetlights, waste issues, and other public infrastructure problems.
Our mission is simple: make city mainten: Our mission is simple: make city maintenance more transparent and faster by connecting citizens, community feedback, and municipal follow-up in one place.
Every report includes category and locat: Every report includes category and location context so maintenance teams can prioritize urgent issues and update status as work progresses.
Need help with a report or account acces: Need help with a report or account access? Reach our support team and we will respond as soon as possible.
For emergencies or immediate public safe: For emergencies or immediate public safety concerns, please contact your local emergency or municipal hotline.
We collect account data (such as name an: We collect account data (such as name and email), report details, and optional uploaded images to operate the Madinova platform and improve maintenance response quality.
We use this information to authenticate: We use this information to authenticate users, display reports, prevent abuse, and support issue moderation. We do not sell personal information.
Madinova may use cookies and similar tec: Madinova may use cookies and similar technologies for session management, security, and analytics. If Google AdSense is enabled, Google may use cookies to serve personalized or non-personalized ads based on your browsing context.
Third-party vendors, including Google, m: Third-party vendors, including Google, may use cookies to show ads. Users can manage ad personalization settings through Google's Ads Settings and browser cookie controls.
If you need data correction or deletion: If you need data correction or deletion assistance, contact us through the Contact page.
By using Fix Street, you agree to submit: By using Fix Street, you agree to submit accurate, lawful, and respectful reports. You are responsible for the content you publish, including text, images, and comments.
Prohibited activity includes false repor: Prohibited activity includes false reporting, harassment, spam, hate speech, and uploading illegal or harmful content. Violations may result in content removal or account restrictions.
The platform includes moderation by admi: The platform includes moderation by administrators. Admins may review, update status, hide, or remove reports and comments to maintain data quality, legal compliance, and public safety.
Fix Street is provided on an 'as availab: Fix Street is provided on an 'as available' basis. We strive for reliability, but we do not guarantee uninterrupted service or immediate issue resolution by municipal teams.
Continued use of the platform indicates: Continued use of the platform indicates acceptance of any future policy updates.
footer.tagline: Report street maintenance issues and help improve your city.
footer.built_with_care: Built with care for your city.
help.citizens.title: Help for Citizens
help.citizens.subtitle: Learn how to report street maintenance issues effectively
help.citizens.getting_started.title: Getting Started
help.citizens.getting_started.descriptio: Welcome to Madinova! Our platform helps you report street maintenance issues directly to city authorities.
To get started, simply create an account or log in if you already have one.
Once logged in, you can start reporting issues in your area.
help.citizens.reporting_issues.title: Reporting Issues
help.citizens.reporting_issues.descripti: When you find a street maintenance problem, take a clear photo and describe the issue.
Select the appropriate category (Road Damage, Street Lighting, or Infrastructure) and provide your location.
Submit your report and track its progress through our dashboard.
help.citizens.tracking_reports.title: Tracking Your Reports
help.citizens.tracking_reports.descripti: After submitting a report, you can monitor its status from your dashboard.
Reports go through several stages: Submitted, Under Review, In Progress, and Resolved.
You'll receive updates as your report progresses through these stages.
help.conditions.title: Conditions of Use
help.conditions.subtitle: Terms and conditions for using Madinova platform
help.conditions.general_terms.title: General Terms
help.conditions.general_terms.descriptio: By using Madinova, you agree to report street maintenance issues accurately and responsibly.
All reports must be made in good faith and should not contain false or misleading information.
Users are responsible for the accuracy of the information they provide in their reports.
help.conditions.user_responsibilities.de: Provide accurate location information when reporting issues.
Take clear, relevant photos that help authorities understand the problem.
Respect other users and maintain a constructive approach to community reporting.
help.conditions.platform_usage.title: Platform Usage
help.conditions.platform_usage.descripti: The platform is intended for reporting legitimate street maintenance issues only.
Misuse of the platform may result in account suspension or termination.
City authorities reserve the right to verify and prioritize reports based on available resources.
help.privacy.title: Privacy Policy
help.privacy.subtitle: How we protect your personal information
help.privacy.data_collection.title: Data Collection
help.privacy.data_collection.description: We collect personal information necessary to provide our services, including name, email, and location data.
Report data includes photos, descriptions, and location information to help authorities address issues.
We use cookies and similar technologies to improve your experience on our platform.
help.privacy.data_usage.title: Data Usage
help.privacy.data_usage.description1: Your personal information is used to create and manage your account and reports.
help.privacy.data_usage.description2: Location data helps us provide location-specific services and improve our platform.
help.privacy.data_usage.description3: We may use aggregated, anonymized data for analytics and platform improvement.
help.privacy.data_sharing.title: Data Sharing
help.privacy.data_sharing.description1: Report information is shared with relevant city authorities to address maintenance issues.
help.privacy.data_sharing.description2: We do not sell personal information to third parties for marketing purposes.
help.privacy.data_sharing.description3: Data may be shared with service providers who help us operate the platform, under strict confidentiality agreements.
help.contact.title: Contact Us
help.contact.subtitle: Get in touch with our support team
help.contact.get_help.title: Get Help
help.contact.get_help.description1: If you need assistance with the platform or have questions about your reports, our support team is here to help.
help.contact.get_help.description2: You can reach us through the contact form below or by email.
help.contact.get_help.description3: We typically respond to inquiries within 24-48 hours.
help.contact.contact_form.title: Contact Form
help.contact.contact_form.name: Your Name
help.contact.contact_form.subject: Subject
help.contact.contact_form.error: Failed to send message. Please try again.
help.authorities.title: Help for Authorities
help.authorities.subtitle: Manage reports and coordinate maintenance efforts effectively
help.authorities.managing_reports.title: Managing Reports
help.authorities.managing_reports.descri: As an authority, you have access to a comprehensive dashboard to manage all reported issues.
You can assign reports to teams, update their status, and communicate directly with citizens.
Track maintenance progress and generate reports for resource planning.
help.citizens.what_is_madinova.title: What is Madinova?
help.citizens.what_is_madinova.descripti: Madinova is an independent citizen platform that allows residents to report problems in their streets and neighborhoods, such as potholes, broken streetlights, garbage, graffiti, or other public issues.
Madinova is not a government website. However, reports submitted are forwarded to the competent authorities so they can intervene quickly.
All reports are also published on the platform so that other citizens can see already reported problems, avoid duplicates, and follow the evolution of their neighborhood.
help.citizens.how_to_report.title: How to make a report?
help.citizens.how_to_report.intro: Making a report on Madinova is simple and fast:
help.citizens.how_to_report.step1: Go to the homepage and choose your location on the map or search your area.
help.citizens.how_to_report.step2: Place a point exactly at the location of the problem.
help.citizens.how_to_report.step3: Clearly describe the problem (e.g., pothole, broken lighting, garbage, etc.).
help.citizens.how_to_report.step4: Add photos if possible to better illustrate the situation.
help.citizens.how_to_report.step5: Send your report and wait for confirmation.
help.citizens.how_to_report.after_sendin: After sending, your report will be verified and forwarded to the relevant services for processing.
help.citizens.reports_public.title: Are reports public?
help.citizens.reports_public.description: Yes. All reports on Madinova are public. This allows more transparency and helps citizens see problems already reported in their area.
This also helps avoid duplicates and more easily track repair progress.
help.citizens.accounts_notifications.des: You do not need to create an account to report a problem. However, an account allows you to follow your reports and receive updates.
You can also receive notifications to be informed of new problems in your area.
help.citizens.what_can_report.title: What can I report?
help.citizens.what_can_report.intro: Madinova is designed for public problems such as:
help.citizens.what_can_report.emergency_: For emergencies, please contact emergency services directly.
help.citizens.technical_problems.title: In case of technical problems
help.citizens.technical_problems.descrip: If the platform is not working correctly, first check your internet connection and try again.
If the problem persists, contact support specifying your device, browser, and the problem encountered.
help.conditions.platform_agreement.title: Platform Usage Agreement
help.conditions.platform_agreement.gener: By using Madinova, you agree to comply with applicable laws and platform rules. Any abusive use may result in sanctions.
help.conditions.platform_agreement.user_: The user undertakes to provide accurate, verifiable and honest information. It is forbidden to submit false reports or misleading information.
help.conditions.platform_agreement.autho: Madinova is intended solely for reports related to public problems such as roads, lighting, cleanliness or infrastructure.
help.conditions.platform_agreement.prohi: It is strictly forbidden to publish offensive, defamatory, violent, discriminatory content, or any content unrelated to the platform's objectives.
help.conditions.platform_agreement.respe: Users must remain respectful in their descriptions and interactions. Any abusive behavior, harassment or inappropriate language is prohibited.
help.conditions.platform_agreement.priva: It is forbidden to publish sensitive personal information (exact address, phone number, etc.) in public reports.
help.conditions.platform_agreement.sanct: In case of non-compliance with the rules, Madinova reserves the right to suspend or delete an account, as well as delete the relevant content.
help.conditions.platform_agreement.trans: In serious cases (illegal content, threats or abuse), information may be transmitted to the competent authorities in accordance with the law.
help.conditions.important.title: Important
help.conditions.important.description: Madinova is a public platform. All reports must remain responsible, constructive and useful for the community. The goal is to improve the city, not to harm people or organizations.
help.privacy.privacy_important.title: Your Privacy is Important
help.privacy.privacy_important.data_coll: We only collect information necessary for the proper functioning of the Madinova platform, such as your name, email and details of reports you submit.
help.privacy.privacy_important.data_usag: Your information is used to forward your reports to the competent authorities and provide you with updates on their processing.
help.privacy.privacy_important.data_secu: We implement security measures to protect your data against unauthorized access. Passwords are stored securely and encrypted.
help.privacy.privacy_important.data_shar: Madinova does not sell your personal data. Some report information may be made public to ensure transparency and avoid duplicates.
help.privacy.privacy_important.your_righ: You have the right to access your data, modify it or request its deletion in accordance with applicable laws.
help.privacy.report_data.title: Report Data
help.privacy.report_data.description: When you submit a report, information related to the problem (description, location, images) may be displayed publicly to inform the community and improve transparency. Your sensitive personal information (such as your email or phone number) is never displayed publicly.
help.privacy.cookies.title: Cookies
help.privacy.cookies.description: Madinova may use cookies to improve your experience, remember your login and analyze site usage. This data helps us improve platform performance and quality.
help.privacy.data_retention.title: Data Retention
help.privacy.data_retention.description: We retain your data only for the duration necessary for the service to function. Public reports may be retained to provide useful history for the community and urban research.
help.privacy.contact.title: Contact
help.privacy.contact.description: If you have questions about this privacy policy or your personal data, you can contact us through Madinova support.
